creator: brd@FreeBSD.org
text:
No, the ports tree follows the FreeBSD support cycle: https://www.freebsd.org/security/

This has already been discussed:
https://lists.freebsd.org/pipermail/freebsd-pkg/2016-May/001651.html

If it works, that is great!  Effort will not be made to keep it working.  Especially when there are so many issues with 9.x let alone 8.x, that are holding things back.
